title: rosa × provincialis var. centifolia
intro: Rosa × provincialis var. centifolia, also known as the rose of a hundred leaves or herb of love, is a plant species within the rose family that is often used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. This plant contains essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties and potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as the ability to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Rosa × provincialis var. centifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
